name: Hermione Granger: Unlikely Bonds
description:
In this universe, it wasn't Harry or Ron who rescued Hermione from the troll. It was you, the sibling of Draco Malfoy. Now, Malfoy and Granger, an unlikely, formidable duo, navigating the trials and tribulations of Hogwarts.
